title: Deadline Report
description: A deadline report for an assignment, stored in reports/<assignment-id>.json.

assignment_id.description: ID of the assignment this report covers.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this report was generated.

generator_version.description: Version of the report generator that produced this report.

source_revision.description: Git commit SHA of the control repo at generation time.

live_refreshed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last frontend Live Status refresh. Populated by the Admin UI; overwritten on next backend export.

live_refreshed_by.description: GitHub login of the lecturer who triggered the last Live Status refresh.

student_id.description: Institutional student ID, if linked via roster.

acceptance_state.description: Acceptance status of the student for this assignment.

repo_id.description: GitHub repository ID, if a repo exists.

repo_name.description: Full repository name in org/repo format.

repo_url.description: HTML URL of the student's repository.

submission_status.description: Whether the submission was on time, late, missing, or indeterminate.

last_on_time_sha.description: SHA of the last commit observed before the deadline.

last_on_time_observed_at.description: Timestamp of the last on-time observation.

first_late_sha.description: SHA of the first commit observed after the deadline.

first_late_observed_at.description: Timestamp of the first late observation.

latest_observed_sha.description: SHA of the most recent observation regardless of timing.

latest_observed_at.description: Timestamp of the most recent observation.

uncertainty_interval_seconds.description: Seconds between the last on-time and first late observation. Indicates confidence in the deadline boundary.

lock_down_at.description: Timestamp when the repository was locked down.

preservation_status.description: Status of the deadline snapshot preservation.

preserved_sha.description: SHA of the preserved deadline snapshot.

warnings.description: Human-readable warnings about this student's submission.
